title: Southside 1-1000
writer: Milton Raison, Bert C. Brown, Leo Townsend
actors: Don DeFore, Andrea King, George Tobias
plot: The US secret service goes after a counterfeit ring, whose engraver Eugene Deane has covertly constructed his plates while serving a life sentence in San Quentin. In order to infiltrate the gang, federal agent John Riggs poses as ...
